nasb.text: So the soldiers, in accordance with their orders, took Paul and brought him by night to Antipatris.

esv.text: So the soldiers, according to their instructions, took Paul and brought him by night to Antipatris.

cnv.text: 於是士兵照著吩咐，把保羅提出來，連夜帶到安提帕底。

ccb.text: 军兵奉命行事，连夜护送保罗到安提帕底。

csbs.text: 于是士兵们按照命令，把保罗接走，连夜送到安提帕底。
